description: Hard hat missing — worker in active work zone without head protection
visual_signals: person in construction area with uncovered head
bare head near overhead hazards or active work
worker without hard hat among helmeted crew

description: Hi-vis vest missing — worker near mobile equipment or roadway without high-visibility garment
visual_signals: person in dark clothing near heavy equipment travel path
worker without reflective vest in active traffic area
individual lacking fluorescent garment in equipment zone

description: Safety glasses missing — worker performing grinding, cutting, or drilling without eye protection
visual_signals: person operating grinder with no safety glasses or goggles
sparks directed at unprotected face during cutting
worker drilling overhead without eye protection visible

description: Gloves missing — worker handling sharp materials, chemicals, or rough surfaces without hand protection
visual_signals: bare hands gripping rebar or sheet metal edges
worker handling chemical container without gloves
ungloved hands manipulating rough lumber or concrete forms

description: Steel-toe boots missing — worker in active area wearing sneakers, sandals, or non-protective footwear
visual_signals: sneakers or athletic shoes visible on worker in construction zone
open-toe sandals worn on active job site
non-safety footwear lacking toe cap or ankle support

description: Unguarded leading edge — open perimeter edge at elevation without guardrail or warning line
visual_signals: roof or floor slab edge with no guardrail or safety cable
open building perimeter at height with no barrier visible
worker near unprotected edge of elevated deck or platform

description: Missing guardrail at floor opening — hole or opening in floor/deck without standard railing or cover
visual_signals: uncovered hole in floor deck with no barrier
floor opening missing plywood cover or guardrail
stairway or shaft opening without protective railing

description: Worker at height without harness — person working above 6 feet with no fall arrest system visible
visual_signals: person on elevated steel beam without harness or lanyard
worker on roof edge with no fall arrest equipment visible
individual climbing structure above 6 feet lacking body harness

description: Harness not clipped in — worker wearing harness but lanyard is not connected to anchor point
visual_signals: harness worn with lanyard dangling unconnected at side
snap hook hanging free while worker is at height
retractable lifeline not attached to D-ring on harness

description: Improper ladder use — ladder unsecured, wrong angle, damaged, or worker overreaching from ladder
visual_signals: ladder placed at steep angle without proper 4-to-1 ratio
worker leaning far to one side from ladder
ladder top not extending 3 feet above landing with no securing

description: Missing scaffold guardrail/toprail — scaffold platform above 10 feet lacking top rail on open side
visual_signals: scaffold platform edge without horizontal top rail
open side of scaffold at height with no railing
worker standing on scaffold deck with unguarded drop-off

description: Missing scaffold midrail — scaffold guardrail system lacks required mid-rail between toprail and deck
visual_signals: scaffold guardrail with large gap between top rail and platform
single rail at top with no mid-height rail on scaffold
incomplete guardrail system missing intermediate horizontal member

description: Scaffold missing cross-bracing — scaffold frame lacks diagonal bracing needed for structural stability
visual_signals: scaffold frame without diagonal cross members
scaffold bays with only vertical and horizontal members and no X-brace
swaying or visibly unstable scaffold lacking lateral bracing

description: Scaffold on unstable base — scaffold legs placed on soft ground, uneven surface, or without base plates and mudsills
visual_signals: scaffold leg sinking into soft ground or mud
scaffold frame sitting on uneven terrain without leveling
scaffold base lacking metal base plates or wooden mudsills

description: Scaffold planks with gaps — working platform has gaps greater than 1 inch between planks or between plank and uprights
visual_signals: visible daylight gap between scaffold planks
space between plank end and scaffold upright exceeding one inch
incomplete scaffold decking with missing plank sections

description: Unprotected trench edges — excavation/trench deeper than 4 feet without shoring, sloping, or shielding
visual_signals: vertical-walled trench deeper than 4 feet with no shoring
deep excavation with straight unsupported soil walls
workers in trench without trench box or sloped walls visible

description: No barricade around excavation — open excavation lacking guardrails, fencing, or barrier to prevent falls
visual_signals: open excavation edge with no fencing or caution tape
unmarked trench edge accessible to foot traffic
excavation perimeter without physical barrier or warning line

description: Spoil pile too close to trench — excavated soil placed within 2 feet of trench edge creating surcharge load
visual_signals: mound of excavated dirt piled right at trench edge
soil pile encroaching within 2 feet of excavation lip
spoil material overhanging or slumping back into trench

description: Missing ladder for trench egress — trench over 4 feet deep without ladder or ramp within 25 feet of workers
visual_signals: workers standing in deep trench with no ladder in view
trench longer than 50 feet with no visible egress point
excavation over 4 feet deep lacking ramp or stairway access

description: Exposed wiring — live electrical conductors or wiring without insulation, covers, or junction boxes
visual_signals: bare copper wire ends protruding from open junction box
uninsulated conductors hanging from temporary panel
live wires exposed without wire nuts or covers in place

description: Damaged extension cord — cord with cut insulation, exposed copper, missing ground prong, or taped splices
visual_signals: extension cord with visible inner wires through cut jacket
electrical tape splice on cord in use on job site
plug end of cord missing third ground prong

description: Missing GFCI protection — portable tools or temporary wiring without ground-fault circuit interrupter
visual_signals: tool plugged into non-GFCI outlet on job site
temporary power panel with standard outlets lacking GFCI
extension cord in wet area connected to unprotected receptacle

description: Crane load without tag lines — suspended load being moved without tag/guide ropes to control swing
visual_signals: crane-suspended load swinging freely with no rope guiding it
rigged load in air with no tag line attached to control rotation
load being hoisted over work area without guide ropes visible

description: Equipment operating without spotter — heavy machinery reversing or operating in blind spots with no signal person
visual_signals: excavator or backhoe reversing with no spotter visible
dump truck backing up near workers without signal person
large equipment maneuvering in congested area with no banksman

description: Debris on walkways — construction debris, scrap, tools, or hoses creating tripping hazards in travel paths
visual_signals: scrap lumber and nails scattered across walkway
air hoses and power cords strewn across pedestrian path
loose debris and tools cluttering designated travel route

description: Improperly stacked materials — lumber, pipes, or supplies stacked without chocking, too high, or leaning
visual_signals: tall stack of lumber leaning without support or chocks
pipes piled high without blocking to prevent rolling
material stack tilting or unstable on uneven ground

description: Protruding nails — boards or formwork with exposed nails or screws in walkways or work areas
visual_signals: nails sticking up from discarded boards on ground
formwork debris with exposed sharp screw points upward
strip of wood with protruding nails in pedestrian walkway

description: Fire extinguisher missing or obstructed — required extinguisher absent from hot work area or access path blocked
visual_signals: empty fire extinguisher bracket near welding operations
extinguisher buried behind materials with no clear access
hot work area with no fire extinguisher within 50 feet visible

description: Hot work without fire watch — welding, cutting, or grinding performed with no fire watch personnel or blanket
visual_signals: welder working alone with sparks falling and no fire watch person
cutting torch in use near combustibles without dedicated watch
grinding sparks showering area with no attendant monitoring ignition

description: Compressed gas cylinders unsecured — oxygen, acetylene, or propane cylinders stored upright without chains or racks
visual_signals: gas cylinders standing upright without chain or strap securing them
acetylene and oxygen bottles side by side with no rack or chain
cylinder with missing valve cap standing free without restraint

description: Missing safety signage — hazard area lacks required warning, danger, or caution signs
visual_signals: hazardous work area with no warning or danger sign posted
entrance to excavation or confined space without signage
electrical panel or high-voltage area lacking required placards

description: Unbarricaded hazard zone — active hazard area without cones, tape, fencing, or physical barriers to restrict entry
visual_signals: open hazard area with no caution tape or cones
active overhead work zone without ground-level barricades
hazardous operation in progress with unrestricted public access

description: Confined space entry without permit or signage — worker entering confined space with no permit posted or danger sign displayed per 1926 Subpart AA
visual_signals: worker climbing into manhole or tank with no permit sign visible
confined space entry point lacking danger entry permit required sign
open confined space hatch with no posted entry permit on display

description: Confined space missing attendant — no dedicated standby person visible at confined space entry point while entrant is inside
visual_signals: open confined space hatch with no attendant stationed outside
manhole entry in progress with no person monitoring from exterior
confined space opening unattended while equipment indicates worker inside

description: Confined space lacking ventilation — no forced-air blower or ventilation duct visible at confined space entry during work
visual_signals: confined space opening with no ventilation blower or duct present
worker entering tank without portable fan or air supply visible
manhole entry without flexible ventilation hose running inside

description: Confined space missing retrieval equipment — no rescue tripod, davit arm, or retrieval winch set up at entry point
visual_signals: confined space entry with no tripod or davit visible nearby
manhole opening without rescue retrieval system staged at surface
vertical entry point lacking winch or retrieval line for rescue

description: Steel erection — connector without required double lanyard or personal fall arrest while making connections at height per 1926 Subpart R
visual_signals: ironworker on column or beam with only single lanyard and no tie-off
steel connector walking beam without visible double-hook lanyard
worker bolting steel connection at height without retractable lifeline attached

description: Steel column not secured — erected steel column standing without minimum four anchor bolts tightened or temporary guying in place
visual_signals: steel column standing on base plate with loose or missing anchor bolts
newly erected column with no guy cables or temporary bracing visible
column visibly leaning or unsupported after crane release

description: Metal decking bundles unsecured — steel deck bundles placed on structural members without being secured against displacement by wind or load
visual_signals: bundle of metal decking sitting loose on steel beams
stacked decking sheets on open structural frame without tie-down
unsecured metal deck bundle near open edge at elevation

description: Demolition without engineering survey — structural demolition underway with no posted engineering survey or demolition plan visible
visual_signals: active demolition of structural elements with no posted plan
building being dismantled floor by floor without visible survey notice
wrecking operations on structure with no engineering assessment posted

description: Damaged floor during demolition — workers on demolition floor with holes, weakened sections, or compromised structural integrity per 1926 Subpart T
visual_signals: workers standing on partially demolished floor with visible holes
weakened or sagging floor slab in building being demolished
demolition level with broken concrete and exposed rebar creating fall risk

description: Missing debris chute — demolition debris being thrown or dropped from elevation without enclosed chute when drop exceeds 20 feet
visual_signals: debris falling freely from upper floor of building under demolition
workers tossing demolition rubble over edge without chute
material dropping from elevation with no enclosed debris chute visible

description: Concrete formwork inadequate — forms visibly bowing, leaking, or lacking sufficient bracing and shoring to support wet concrete load per 1926 Subpart Q
visual_signals: formwork panels bowing outward under concrete pressure
wet concrete leaking through gaps between form panels
insufficient shoring props visible under elevated concrete deck forms

description: Impalement hazard on rebar — exposed vertical rebar without protective caps or mushroom guards creating impalement risk
visual_signals: vertical rebar projecting upward without plastic safety caps
exposed rebar stakes near walkways lacking impalement protection
uncapped rebar stubs protruding from concrete slab or footing

description: Post-tensioning hazard — workers behind or near stressed post-tension cables or jacking equipment without barriers
visual_signals: workers near active post-tension jacking operations without exclusion zone
stressed PT cables without warning barriers at anchorage end
post-tensioning strand tails protruding without guarding or warning tape

description: Masonry wall unbraced — freestanding masonry wall over 8 feet without lateral bracing or shoring to prevent wind or impact collapse
visual_signals: tall block wall standing without visible lateral bracing
freshly laid masonry wall with no temporary supports or bracing
unsupported masonry partition leaning or showing instability

description: Welding without flash screen — arc welding in open area without welding curtain or screen to protect passersby from UV flash per 1926 Subpart J
visual_signals: arc welding in progress in open area with no welding screen
bright welding flash visible without curtain shielding other workers
welder operating near pedestrian path without flash protection barrier

description: Cylinder storage violation — oxygen and fuel gas cylinders stored together within 20 feet without fire-rated barrier per 1926.350
visual_signals: oxygen and acetylene cylinders stored side by side without barrier
mixed gas cylinders in storage area lacking 20-foot separation or wall
fuel and oxidizer bottles grouped together without fire-rated partition

description: Welder missing proper PPE — person welding without proper shade lens, welding gloves, or leather apron/sleeves
visual_signals: welder holding torch without welding helmet or face shield
person arc welding in short sleeves without leather protection
worker grinding weld with no face shield or safety glasses

description: Missing GHS label — chemical container on site without Globally Harmonized System label showing pictograms, signal word, and hazard statements per 1926.59
visual_signals: unlabeled chemical jug or pail on construction site
spray bottle or container without GHS-compliant label visible
chemical drum lacking pictogram diamonds or hazard information

description: SDS station missing or inaccessible — no safety data sheet binder or station available in area where hazardous chemicals are in use
visual_signals: chemical storage area with no SDS binder or station visible
hazardous materials in use with no safety data sheet access point
empty or missing SDS holder in chemical storage trailer

description: Silica dust exposure — dry cutting, grinding, or drilling concrete/masonry without wet methods or dust vacuum attachment per 1926.1153
visual_signals: worker dry-cutting concrete with visible dust cloud and no water
masonry saw operating without water spray creating heavy dust
grinding concrete surface with no vacuum dust collector attached

description: Missing respiratory protection for silica — worker in visible silica dust without N95 or higher respirator per 1926.1153
visual_signals: worker in concrete dust cloud with no respirator on face
person near masonry cutting with mouth and nose uncovered
dust-generating activity with nearby workers lacking respiratory protection

description: Hearing protection missing near heavy equipment — worker without earplugs or earmuffs within 15 feet of pile driver, jackhammer, or similar high-noise equipment per 1926.52
visual_signals: worker near operating jackhammer with no ear protection visible
person standing close to pile driving operation without earmuffs
crew working adjacent to loud compressor with no hearing protection

description: Missing flagger in active roadway work zone — construction work encroaching on traffic lane without certified flagger or automated signal per 1926.200
visual_signals: construction activity in roadway lane with no flagger present
open lane adjacent to work zone without traffic control person
workers near live traffic without flagger or stop-slow paddle

description: Inadequate work zone barricades — construction work zone near traffic without proper channeling devices, barrels, or concrete barriers
visual_signals: work zone adjacent to traffic with only cones and no barriers
construction area near road lacking channelizing barrels or barricades
workers exposed to traffic with insufficient physical separation

description: Missing or inadequate work zone signage — construction zone without advance warning signs, speed reduction signs, or regulatory work zone signs
visual_signals: road construction area without orange diamond warning signs
work zone lacking speed reduction or lane closure advance signs
construction entrance without flagging or approach warning signage

description: Fire extinguisher missing inspection tag or expired — extinguisher on site with no monthly inspection tag or last inspection over 12 months ago per 1926 Subpart F
visual_signals: fire extinguisher with no inspection tag attached
extinguisher tag showing last check date over one year ago
pressure gauge on extinguisher in red discharged zone

description: Flammable liquid storage violation — gasoline, solvents, or flammable liquids stored outside approved safety cans or flammable storage cabinets
visual_signals: gasoline in unapproved open container on job site
flammable solvents stored in plastic jugs outside rated cabinet
multiple flammable liquid containers outside of yellow storage cabinet

description: Temporary heater too close to combustibles — salamander heater or propane heater placed within 10 feet of combustible materials or tarpaulins
visual_signals: portable heater positioned near stacked lumber or cardboard
propane torpedo heater aimed at plastic sheeting or tarp
temporary heating device adjacent to combustible construction materials

description: Material stored too close to edge — construction materials stacked near unprotected floor edge or excavation creating fall or collapse hazard
visual_signals: pallets of materials stacked within 6 feet of open floor edge
heavy materials stored near excavation edge without setback
stacked supplies near building perimeter at elevation without barrier

description: Unsecured material on elevated surface — loose materials, tools, or equipment on elevated platform without toe board or containment to prevent falling objects
visual_signals: loose tools and material at scaffold edge without toe board
unsecured items on elevated platform near open side
construction materials on roof edge without containment barrier

description: Brick or block stacked too high — masonry units stacked over 6 feet high without tapering or interlocking creating collapse hazard
visual_signals: tall stack of concrete blocks exceeding 6 feet without step-back
bricks piled high in straight column without tapering
masonry material stack leaning or showing instability

description: Damaged power tool cord — portable power tool with frayed, cut, or damaged cord insulation creating shock hazard
visual_signals: power tool cord with visible inner wire through damaged jacket
circular saw cord with electrical tape repairs
drill cord with crushed or flattened section exposing conductors

description: Grinder guard missing — angle grinder or bench grinder in use without adjustable tongue guard or wheel guard per 1926.303
visual_signals: angle grinder being operated with wheel guard removed
bench grinder with no tongue guard or tool rest
grinder disc fully exposed without safety guard in place

description: Powder-actuated tool used by uncertified operator — powder-actuated tool in use without operator certification card visible or posted per 1926.302
visual_signals: worker firing powder-actuated tool without certification visible
Hilti or Ramset gun in use near unprotected workers
powder-actuated tool stored loaded without carrying case

description: Circular saw missing blade guard — portable circular saw with lower blade guard retracted, removed, or non-functional
visual_signals: circular saw with lower guard pinned back exposing full blade
worker cutting with saw blade guard removed or jammed open
saw resting on surface with blade exposed and no guard return

description: Insufficient portable toilets — construction site lacking minimum required portable sanitation facilities per 1926.51
visual_signals: large crew on site with only one or no portable toilet visible
portable toilet tipped over or visibly out of service
construction site with no sanitation facilities in view

description: Missing handwash station — no hand washing facilities available near portable toilets or food consumption areas per 1926.51
visual_signals: portable toilet area with no handwash station nearby
workers eating in break area with no hand washing facility
job site lacking portable hand washing unit or water container

description: No potable drinking water — construction site without accessible clean drinking water supply or containers for workers per 1926.51
visual_signals: work area with no water cooler or drinking water container visible
workers in hot conditions with no hydration station in view
job site lacking marked potable water dispenser
